verses.text: Paul in ulian kikhawmte limtakin enin, “Lawmte aw, tuni ciangdong ka nuntak sung tawntung, Pasian mai-ah kisuan'na ka nei het kei hi,” a cih leh
siampi lianpenpa Ananias in Paul gei-a omte kiangah, “A muk na betsak un,” a ci hi

Paul in, “Leikang tawh a kizut kulh tawh a kibangpa aw, Pasian in nang hong benggawp taktak ding hi. Keimah thusitna-ah Thukham a zui dingpa hinapi-in Thukham zuiloin kei hong kibetna dingin thu na pia hi,” a ci hi
Paul gei-a om mite in, “Pasian' siampi lianpenpa na zahko hi,” a cih ciangun
Paul in, “Lawmte aw, siampi lianpenpa ahihlam ka thei kei hi. Lai Siangtho in, ‘Na mite uh a ukpa na gensia kei ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi

Paul in tua uliante lakah Saddusi mi leh Farisi mi a omlam a muh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Lawmte aw, kei pen Farisi mite' suan ahi Farisi mi ka hi hi. Mi site hingkik ding hi, ci-in lamenin upna ka neih manin hih lai-ah thusitna ka thuak hi,” a ci hi
Tua thu a gen khit phetin Saddusi mite leh Farisi mite kitawngpah uh a, tua uliante khen nih a pha uh hi

(Bang hang hiam cih leh Saddusi mite in mi a sih khit ciangin hingkik nawnlo ding hi. Vantung mi ahi a, kha ahi zongin omlo hi, ci uh hi. Ahi zongin Farisi mite in hih thu thumte om hi, ci-in a um uh hi

Amau' kitotna awging hupha semsem a, Farisi mite pawlsunga om Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat hong dingin nakpi takin hong pau uh a, “Hih mipa tungah khialhna themkhat zong omlo hi. Vantung mi ahi a, Pasian' sawl khat peuhpeuh in ahi zongin ama tungah thu a gen hi khathei ding hi,” a ci uh hi

Amaute' kitotna hong husia semsem ahih manin amaute in Paul balthanggawp khading hi, ci-in galkapmangpa lunghimawh hi. Tua ahih manin galkapte in Paul va kaikhia-in galkap inn-ah a paipihna dingun thu a pia hi
Tua zanin Paul kiangah Topa hong ding a, “Hang takin om in. Hih Jerusalem khuasungah keima thu genin teci na pan' mah bangin Rom khuapi-ah zong keima thu genin teci na pang ding hi,” a ci hi.
A zing ciangin Jew mite pawlkhat kikhawm uh a, Paul i thahkhit ciang bekin anne tuidawn pan ding hi hang, ci-in kiciamna a nei uh hi
Hih bangin a vaihawm mihing sawmli val bang a pha uh hi
Siampi liante leh upate kiangah pai uh a, “Paul ka thahkhit mateng uh anletui ka neklohna dingun khauhtakin thuciamna khat ka nei khin uh hi

Tu-in note leh uliante in galkapmangpa tungah thu zasak un la, Paul' thu a cingin a theinuam kineihin, note kiangah Paul hong paipihsakna dingin na ngen un. Hih lai mun hong tun'ma-in kote in lamkalah ka na that ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin hih a thahsawmna thu uh, Paul sanggamnu' tapa in za ahih manin galkap inn-ah va pai-in Paul kiangah a va gen hi
Tua ciangin Paul in galkapbute khat samin ama kiangah, “Galkapmangpa kiangah hih tangvalpa va paipih in. Amah in thugen ding khat a nei hi,” a ci hi
Galkapbupa in zong galkapmangpa kiangah va paipih a, “Hih tangvalpa in nang tungah gennop khat hong nei ahih manin nang kiangah kong paipihna dingin thongkia Paul in a hong sawl hi,” a ci hi
Galkapmangpa in zong a khutin tuapa lenin amau gel guak paikhia uh a, “Bang hong gennuam na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Tangvalpa in, “Uliante in Paul' thu a cingin a theinuam kineihin, zing ciangin amaute kiangah Paul na paisakna dingin Jew mi aana neite in ngetding a thukim uh hi

Ahi zongin lamkalah Paul a pangsim dingin mihing sawmli val bang om uh ahih manin amaute' hong ngetna pia kei in. Tua mihing sawmlite in Paul a thahkhit mateng uh anletui a neklohna dingun kiciamna khat bawlkhin uh hi. Amaute a kithawisa-in om uh a, nangma thupiak ding bek a ngak uh ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin galkapmangpa in tangvalpa kiangah, “Kei kiangah hih thu nong kohna thu kuamah theisak kei in,” ci-in a vaikhak khit ciangin a ciahsak hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Gam uk Menzipa Feliks kiangah Paul Kipuak

verses.text: Tua ciangin galkapmangpa in galkapbute nih samin, “Sisaria khua-ah a pai ding galkap za nih sam un la, sakol tung tuang galkap sawmsagih leh teitawi galkap za nih tawh zong pai un la, tuzan nai kua hunin dingkhia un
Paul' tuan'na ding sakol pawlkhat zong keng un la, Menzipa Feliks kiangah hoihtakin va tun'pih un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin galkapmangpa in hih a nuai-a bangin lai khat gelh hi
“A Lian Menzipa aw, Keimah Klaudias Lysias in hopihna lai ka hong gelh hi
Jew mite in hih mipa manin that dektak uh hi. Rom gammi ahihlam ka theih ciangin ka galkapte tawh pai-in ka va honkhia hi
Amaute' mawhsakna bang thu ahi hiam, ci-in theinuam ka hih manin thusit dingin amau' uliante kiangah ka paipih hi
Thong khiatna ding leh sihna thuakna dingin khialhna a bawlna bangmah ka mu kei hi. A mawhsaknate uh amau' thukham ngeina tawh kisai hi lel hi

Jew mite pawlkhat in amah a thahsawmna thu hong kikoh ciangin nangma kiangah puak dingin ka ngaihsun hi. Amah a mawhsakte in nangma mai-ah thu a hong genna dingun amaute kiangah ka gen hi,” ci-in a gelh hi
Galkapte zong a thu ngahna bangun gamta uh a, tua zanin Paul paikhiatpihin Antipatris khua dong a paipih uh hi
A zing ciangin khe galkapte kilehkik uh a, sakol tung tuang galkapteng bek a kha suaksak uh hi
Amaute in Sisaria khua-ah Paul tun'pih uh a, menzipa kiangah a lai puak uh pia-in, ama tungah Paul a ap uh hi
Menzipa in tua laikhak sim a, koi lai gammi na hi hiam, ci-in Paul a dong hi. Amah in Sisaria gammi ahihlam a theih ciangin
“Na langte hong tun' ciangin thu kong sit ding hi,” ci-in a gen khit ciangin, Herod in a lam innsungah Paul koihin a cin'na dingun thu a pia hi.
